records.question: List all distinct product categories.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category

agent.sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category

records.question: Top 5 products by total quantity sold.
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 5

naive.sql:
SELECT p.product_id, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 5;

agent.sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

records.question: Total profit per category for completed orders, where profit = quantity * (unit_price - cost).
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) AS profit FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY profit DESC

naive.sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) AS total_profit
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY p.category;

agent.sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) AS total_profit FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_profit DESC

records.question: Customers whose total completed spend is above the average completed spend across all customers.
records.gold_sql: WITH spend AS (SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS s FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.customer_id) SELECT c.name, sp.s AS spend FROM spend sp JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = sp.customer_id WHERE sp.s > (SELECT AVG(s) FROM spend) ORDER BY sp.s DESC

naive.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_spend
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id AND o.status = 'completed'
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > (
    SELECT AVG(cust_total) FROM (
        SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price) AS cust_total
        FROM orders o2
        JOIN order_items oi2 ON oi2.order_id = o2.order_id
        WHERE o2.status = 'completed'
        GROUP BY o2.customer_id
    )
);

agent.sql: WITH spend AS (SELECT c.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id AND o.status = 'completed' JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id) SELECT customer_id, total FROM spend WHERE total > (SELECT AVG(total) FROM spend) ORDER BY total DESC

records.question: Monthly completed revenue in 2024 with a running cumulative total.
records.gold_sql: SELECT month, revenue, SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS running_total FROM (SELECT substr(o.order_date, 1, 7) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY month) ORDER BY month

naive.sql:
SELECT month,
       revenue,
       SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS cumulative_revenue
FROM (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month,
           SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE o.status = 'completed'
      AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01'
      AND o.order_date <  '2025-01-01'
    GROUP BY month
)
ORDER BY month;

agent.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY month) SELECT month, ROUND(revenue, 2) AS monthly_revenue, ROUND(SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2) AS cumulative_revenue FROM monthly ORDER BY month

records.question: Each category's share (percentage) of total completed revenue.
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) / (SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price) FROM order_items oi2 JOIN orders o2 ON o2.order_id = oi2.order_id WHERE o2.status = 'completed'), 2) AS pct_of_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY pct_of_revenue DESC

naive.sql:
SELECT p.category,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) /
             (SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price)
              FROM order_items oi2
              JOIN orders o2 ON o2.order_id = oi2.order_id
              WHERE o2.status = 'completed'), 2) AS revenue_share_pct
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o   ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue_share_pct DESC;

agent.sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) / (SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price) FROM order_items oi2 JOIN orders o2 ON oi2.order_id = o2.order_id WHERE o2.status = 'completed'), 2) AS pct_of_completed_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY pct_of_completed_revenue DESC

records.question: The best-selling product by quantity within each category.
records.gold_sql: WITH sales AS (SELECT p.category AS category, p.name AS name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC) AS rnk FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id) SELECT category, name, qty FROM sales WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY category

naive.sql: SELECT category, name, total_qty FROM (SELECT p.category, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC) AS rn FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id) WHERE rn = 1;

agent.sql: SELECT category, name, total_qty FROM (SELECT p.category AS category, p.name AS name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC) AS rk FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.category, p.name) WHERE rk = 1 ORDER BY category

records.question: Top 3 categories by profit margin percentage (profit / revenue) on completed orders.
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) / SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS margin_pct FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY margin_pct DESC LIMIT 3

naive.sql:
SELECT p.category,
       100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) / SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS profit_margin_pct
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o   ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY profit_margin_pct DESC
LIMIT 3;

agent.sql: SELECT p.category, SUM((oi.unit_price - p.cost) * oi.quantity) AS profit, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS revenue, 100.0 * SUM((oi.unit_price - p.cost) * oi.quantity) / SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS margin_pct FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY margin_pct DESC LIMIT 3
